EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} finished a session in Designer mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} finished a session in Thick Client mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.id} finished a session in the background mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} finished a session in the background mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} finished a session in Web Client mode on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} finished a session in Thin Client mode on host {event_src.host}
